description: Create a content slide with a left navigation sidebar and right sidebar bullet list explaining AI black box transparency, using a central process-style diagram and a supporting text box in a sidebar-right layout.

header.headline: Shedding light into the AI black box – Greater transparency will improve levels of trust and acceptance between humans and machines
header.sub: What happens inside an AI black box

main.title: Inside the AI black box
main.body: A conceptual diagram shows inputs entering an AI system, processing within the black box, and outputs emerging, connected by directional lines. The slide emphasizes that greater transparency into how AI systems make decisions can improve trust and acceptance between humans and machines.

items.text: Greater transparency will improve levels of trust and acceptance between humans and machines
The slide explains what happens inside an AI black box through a conceptual visual from input to output
Humans & Machines is the active section within the Technology & Innovation chapter
